translations.code.ai.reopenToRetry: Reopen this tab to retry — no auto-retry to avoid token spend.
translations.code.app.subtitle: AI-Powered Codebase Intelligence
translations.code.app.title: Flyto2 Code
translations.code.assetMap.noMappings: No mappings yet. Use AI Suggest or manually link domains below.
translations.code.assetMap.subtitle: Link external domains to internal repositories for CVE cross-correlation
translations.code.assetMap.title: Asset Mapping
translations.code.auth.pillarBullet1: Cross-dimensional correlation — code, infrastructure, and exposure in one view
translations.code.auth.pillarBullet2: Closed-loop verification — static plus dynamic, with a confidence verdict
translations.code.auth.pillarBullet3: Industry-standard scoring (250–900) across three deployment modes
translations.code.auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
translations.code.auth.resetPasswordHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
translations.code.auth.welcomeDescription: AI-powered codebase intelligence. Security scanning, architecture analysis, and engineering insights — all in one war room.
translations.code.autofix.confidenceReasonFailed: {n} verify gate(s) reported failures — see {gate} below for details.
translations.code.autofix.confidenceReasonSkipped: Verify gates were skipped ({list}) — patch was not actually validated.
translations.code.autofix.confidenceReasonTier1: Deterministic transform ({category}) and {n} gate(s) passed — mechanical change, safe to PR.
translations.code.autofix.confidenceReasonTier2: AI-generated patch and {n} gate(s) passed — code-correctness still needs human review.
translations.code.autofix.confidenceTipHigh: All verify gates passed — patch is ready to PR.
translations.code.autofix.confidenceTipMedium: One or more verify gates did not pass — review carefully.
translations.code.autofix.disclaimer: AI-assisted patch. Review before merging — the engine verified lint, tests, and runner gates passed, but human judgement is required for code-correctness.
translations.code.autofix.disclaimerSAST: AI-generated patch — code correctness requires human review. Verify gates only check that lint+tests pass, not whether the change preserves intent.
translations.code.autofix.empty: No AutoFix-eligible findings yet — the inventory populates after the AutoFix system detects fixable code. Click Run on any category tab to seed this list.
translations.code.autofix.fetchError: Could not load this finding — the engine returned an error. The finding may have been resolved out of the latest scan, or the cache is out of sync. Re-running the scan often clears this.
translations.code.autofix.loadErrorHint: Most often this means the engine is running an older binary. Rebuild + restart flyto-engine; the new /autofix/findings route + autofix_finding table land on first start. Check the engine logs for the exact failure if this persists.
translations.code.autofix.noChange: No textual change between before and after.
translations.code.autofix.noMatch: No findings match the current filter.
translations.code.autofix.noPreview: No diff available — the patch generation failed or the finding is no longer detected.
translations.code.autofix.prBlockedSkipped: PR blocked — verify gates were skipped ({list}). Re-run with the runner online so the patch can be verified before merging.
translations.code.autofix.prDisabledTip: PR is gated on verify pass — see the message above for which gate failed.
translations.code.autofix.previewGenerating: Generating preview — cloning repo, running detect+transform, executing verify gates…
translations.code.autofix.subtitle: AI-powered fix suggestions for dependencies, code, and infrastructure
translations.code.autofix.summaryCount: {count} fixable findings across {groups} rule × repo groups
translations.code.autofix.tabTip: AutoFix-eligible findings — click to see per-repo fix previews and open draft PRs.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.auditEmpty: No runs yet — trigger AutoFix or wait for next scan to populate.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.auditNoGates: No gate detail recorded for this run.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.auditPickRun: Pick a run on the left to inspect its gate verdicts.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.categoryEmpty: No rules in this category yet — Tier 2 (AI-proposed) patches will land here as we wire more finding types.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.cleanRule: ✓ no findings — codebase clean for this rule
translations.code.autofix.warroom.hint: Tier 1 = deterministic rules (hand-coded, stable). Tier 2 = AI-proposed patches gated by lint + test + flyto-runner closed-loop probe. Tier 3 = patterns mined from repeated AI fixes get promoted into Tier 1 with human review. Every patch passes 4 verify gates before any PR is opened.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.noRules: No rules configured yet. Run a scan to populate.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.openPRTip: When enabled, every rule with at least one verified-passing patch will get a draft PR opened on GitHub.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.pentestEmpty: No Tier 1 rules for pentest findings yet — Red Team campaign results land in Security → Red Team.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.promotionApproveTip: Tag this shape so an engineer knows to write a Tier 1 deterministic rule for it.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.promotionApproved: Approved — ready for engineer to write Tier 1 rule
translations.code.autofix.warroom.promotionEmpty: No promotion candidates yet — Tier 2 needs to ship a few merged AI patches first for the miner to find patterns.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.promotionHint: Tier 2 (AI-proposed) patches that share the same shape across ≥ 5 occurrences and ≥ 3 distinct repos in the last 30 days. A human reviews each candidate and decides whether to write a Tier 1 deterministic rule for it.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.promotionRejectTip: Drop this shape from the queue — Tier 2 AI fallback continues to handle these.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.settingsHint: Disabled rules are skipped at scan time. Auto-merge means: when ALL 4 verify gates pass, the engine opens a draft PR without waiting for the user to click Run. Off by default — solo founders typically want to read the diff first.
translations.code.autofix.warroom.title: AutoFix — Tier 1 / 2 / 3 pipeline
translations.code.capability.attackSurface.descriptio: Discover your organization's external attack surface. We scan domains, subdomains, exposed services, SSL configurations, DNS records, and technology stacks to identify potential entry points.
translations.code.capability.attackSurface.subtitle: Attack Surface Management
translations.code.capability.attackSurface.title: Attack Surface
translations.code.capability.codeAudit.description: Connect your repositories and get a comprehensive analysis of your codebase. We scan for security vulnerabilities, dead code, complexity hotspots, dependency risks, and license compliance issues.
translations.code.capability.codeAudit.feat1: CVE & secret detection across all dependencies
translations.code.capability.codeAudit.feat2: Dead code identification with confidence scoring
translations.code.capability.codeAudit.subtitle: Static Application Security Testing
translations.code.capability.codeAudit.title: Code Audit
translations.code.capability.createPrompt: Create a new project to start using this capability.
translations.code.capability.pentest.description: Test live websites and APIs without source code access. Our AI-driven pentest engine runs OWASP Top 10 checks, business logic tests, and generates evidence-backed reports with reproduction steps.
translations.code.capability.pentest.subtitle: Dynamic Application Security Testing
translations.code.capability.pentest.title: Penetration Test
translations.code.common.loadError: Failed to load data. Please try again.
translations.code.compliance.emptyDesc: Run a scan to generate compliance evaluation results.
translations.code.compliance.subtitle: Framework compliance status across SOC2, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, OWASP, GDPR, HIPAA, NIST
translations.code.compliance.title: Compliance Dashboard
translations.code.cross.allPassed: All checks passed across all domains.
translations.code.dashboard.connectForPRs: Connect GitHub in Settings to see PR activity
translations.code.dashboard.connectToStart: Go to Settings to connect your repositories
translations.code.dashboard.connectToStartDesc: Connect your GitHub or GitLab repositories to start monitoring your organization\
translations.code.dashboard.diffClean: No regressions since last scan — the codebase is holding steady.
translations.code.dashboard.diffEmpty: No previous scans to compare against. Run another scan to start tracking deltas.
translations.code.dashboard.noDataDesc: Your repositories are connected but haven\
translations.code.dashboard.noGradeChanges: No grade changes in this period
translations.code.dashboard.noPulseItems: No urgent items — your security posture is stable
translations.code.dashboard.noTrendData: Not enough data points for a trend chart. Scores are recorded after each scan.
translations.code.dashboard.pulseTopDesc: Ranked by blast radius — highest impact first
translations.code.dashboard.runScanToSee: Run a scan to see security findings
translations.code.dashboard.scanAllToStart: Scan all repos to populate dashboard
translations.code.dast.aiRunningHint: Hard rules score your attack surface. AI finds patterns humans miss.
translations.code.dast.apiDiscoveryEmpty: Run discovery to scan for API endpoints, documentation, and frameworks.
translations.code.dast.clickjackingDesc: Without X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors, attackers can embed your site in an iframe for clickjacking attacks.
translations.code.dast.cookieNoEncryptDesc: A cookie is set without the 'secure' flag, meaning it can be intercepted over HTTP connections.
translations.code.dast.cookieNoHttpDesc: A cookie without HttpOnly can be accessed by JavaScript, enabling session theft via XSS.
translations.code.dast.cookiePoisonDesc: URL parameters can set cookie values, which may be exploitable for session manipulation.
translations.code.dast.cookieSubdomainDesc: Authentication cookies scoped to parent domain can be accessed by any subdomain, increasing attack surface.
translations.code.dast.cspEvalDesc: CSP does not block eval(), setTimeout() and other functions that can execute unknown code, enabling code injection.
translations.code.dast.cspFallbackDesc: CSP does not define a fallback for a directive, causing the browser to treat that content type as unrestricted.
translations.code.dast.cspInlineCssDesc: CSP allows inline CSS, which can aid social engineering attacks by injecting misleading visual elements.
translations.code.dast.cspInlineJsDesc: CSP is configured but allows inline JavaScript, which is a common XSS attack vector.
translations.code.dast.cspNotSet: Content Security Policy (CSP) header not set
translations.code.dast.cspNotSetDesc: CSP is the first line of defense against XSS and data injection attacks. It controls which content sources are allowed to load and execute.
translations.code.dast.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All discovery data, subdomains, and scan results will be permanently removed.
translations.code.dast.dirBrowsingDesc: Directory listings are enabled, potentially revealing hidden scripts, backup files, and sensitive information.
translations.code.dast.emptyDesc: Add your domains to discover exposed services, SSL status, DNS records, tech stacks, and potential vulnerabilities across your external perimeter.
translations.code.dast.envExposedDesc: Environment files expose infrastructure credentials, API keys, or other sensitive configuration information.
translations.code.dast.graphqlIntrospectDesc: GraphQL introspection reveals the entire API schema including all types, queries, and mutations.
translations.code.dast.graphqlWarning: Introspection is enabled — this exposes your full schema to anyone. Disable in production.
translations.code.dast.heartbleedDesc: OpenSSL Heartbeat Extension vulnerability allows remote attackers to read process memory, potentially disclosing sensitive information.
translations.code.dast.hstsNotSet: TLS not enforced with valid HSTS header
translations.code.dast.hstsNotSetDesc: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) forces browsers to use HTTPS only. Without it, users are vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks via protocol downgrade.
translations.code.dast.httpOnlyDesc: The site responds on HTTP without redirecting to HTTPS, exposing traffic to interception and modification.
translations.code.dast.jwtInvalidDesc: The server accepts JWT tokens with invalid signatures, allowing attackers to modify token payload without detection.
translations.code.dast.jwtNoneDesc: The server accepts JWT tokens signed with the 'none' algorithm, bypassing signature verification entirely.
translations.code.dast.jwtSelfSignedDesc: The server accepts JWT tokens with self-signed JWK keys, allowing attackers to impersonate legitimate users.
translations.code.dast.jwtWeakDesc: The JWT token returned by your server uses a weak or known compromised secret, allowing attackers to forge tokens for unauthorized access.
translations.code.dast.linkRepoHint: Link a repository to filter API routes
translations.code.dast.noApiFindings: No API documentation, GraphQL, or JS bundle endpoints detected.
translations.code.dast.noDmarcDesc: Without DMARC, there is no policy to handle emails that fail SPF/DKIM checks, enabling phishing attacks using your domain.
translations.code.dast.noDnssecDesc: Without DNSSEC, DNS responses can be spoofed, potentially redirecting users to malicious servers.
translations.code.dast.noPageSpeed: No PageSpeed data yet. Run discovery to test.
translations.code.dast.noSniffDesc: Without 'nosniff', browsers may interpret files as a different MIME type, enabling XSS via MIME-type confusion.
translations.code.dast.noSpfDesc: Without SPF (Sender Policy Framework), attackers can send emails appearing to come from your domain (email spoofing).
translations.code.dast.notVerified: Not verified yet — run discovery to test
translations.code.dast.openPortDesc: A service port is publicly accessible that should typically be behind a firewall. Database, cache, and remote access ports exposed to the internet are high-risk attack vectors.
translations.code.dast.poweredByLeakDesc: The server exposes the framework/runtime it uses, helping attackers identify specific vulnerabilities
translations.code.dast.psHintA11y: Missing alt text, contrast issues, or ARIA labels.
translations.code.dast.psHintBP: Using deprecated APIs or insecure resources.
translations.code.dast.psHintPerf: Slow loading. Optimize images, lazy-load, reduce JS bundle.
translations.code.dast.psHintSEO: Missing meta tags, no sitemap, or poor mobile usability.
translations.code.dast.serverLeak: Server leaks info via 'Server' HTTP header
translations.code.dast.serverLeakDesc: The server is exposing its software identity via the Server header. This helps attackers identify known vulnerabilities
translations.code.dast.sessionCookieDesc: The session cookie is missing 'httpOnly' and 'secure' attributes, making it vulnerable to theft by third-party scripts.
translations.code.dast.sessionStorage: Session token found in browser storage
translations.code.dast.sessionStorageDesc: Session tokens stored in localStorage/sessionStorage have no protection against injected third-party scripts.
translations.code.dast.sourceCodeGitDesc: Git repository files are publicly accessible, potentially exposing source code and sensitive configuration.
translations.code.dast.sriMissingDesc: External scripts/styles loaded without integrity attributes can be tampered with if the CDN is compromised.
translations.code.dast.sslExpiryDesc: The TLS certificate is about to expire, which will break HTTPS connections and trigger browser warnings.
translations.code.dast.subtitle: Discover and monitor your external attack surface across all domains
translations.code.dast.tabNabbingDesc: Links with target='_blank' without 'noopener noreferrer' allow the target page to take control of the opener.
translations.code.dim.dns.emptyDesc: Run a domain scan to check DNS security records.
translations.code.dim.dns.fixAXFR: Restrict DNS zone transfers (AXFR) to authorized secondary DNS servers only.
translations.code.dim.dns.fixCAA: Add CAA record to restrict which CAs can issue certificates for your domain.
translations.code.dim.dns.fixDKIM: Configure DKIM in your email provider and publish the DNS TXT record.
translations.code.dim.dns.fixDMARC: Add DMARC TXT at _dmarc.yourdomain.com: v=DMARC1; p=none
translations.code.dim.dns.fixDNSSEC: Enable DNSSEC at your domain registrar. Most support one-click activation.
translations.code.dim.dns.fixSPF: Add SPF TXT record: v=spf1 include:_spf.google.com ~all
translations.code.dim.dns.sub: DNSSEC, SPF, DMARC, DKIM, and CAA records across all domains
translations.code.dim.dns.title: DNS Security
translations.code.dim.email.emptyDesc: Run a domain scan to check email security configuration.
translations.code.dim.email.fixMX: Domain has no MX records — email is not configured.
translations.code.dim.email.fixScore: Configure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC. Use mxtoolbox.com for diagnostics.
translations.code.dim.email.sub: SPF, DKIM, DMARC alignment and email authentication across domains
translations.code.dim.email.title: Email Security
translations.code.dim.headers.emptyDesc: Run a domain scan to check HTTP security headers.
translations.code.dim.headers.fixCSP: Add Content-Security-Policy header. Start with report-only mode.
translations.code.dim.headers.fixPoweredBy: Remove X-Powered-By — it exposes your backend framework.
translations.code.dim.headers.fixServer: Remove the Server header to avoid revealing your web server version.
translations.code.dim.headers.fixXFO: Add X-Frame-Options: DENY to prevent clickjacking.
translations.code.dim.headers.sub: HTTP security headers and server information leakage
translations.code.dim.headers.title: Web Security Headers
translations.code.dim.ports.emptyDesc: Run a domain scan to check open ports.
translations.code.dim.ports.fixDB: Close database ports to the public internet. Use VPN or private network.
translations.code.dim.ports.fixRDP: Close RDP (3389) and VNC (5900). Use VPN for remote access.
translations.code.dim.ports.fixSMB: Close port 445 (SMB/CIFS). Never expose Windows file sharing.
translations.code.dim.ports.sub: Open ports and dangerous services across all domains
translations.code.dim.ports.title: Network Exposure
translations.code.dim.sensitive.emptyDesc: Run a scan to check for exposed sensitive files (.env, .git, backups).
translations.code.dim.sensitive.fixCritical: Remove or restrict access to .env, .git, database backups, config files.
translations.code.dim.sensitive.fixFiles: Review all exposed files. Add server rules to block sensitive paths.
translations.code.dim.sensitive.sub: Exposed configuration files, backups, and development artifacts
translations.code.dim.sensitive.title: Sensitive File Exposure
translations.code.dim.ssl.emptyDesc: Run a domain scan to check SSL/TLS certificates.
translations.code.dim.ssl.fixCipher: Use ECDHE+AESGCM cipher suites. Disable RC4, DES, NULL, EXPORT.
translations.code.dim.ssl.fixExpiry: Renew certificates before expiry. Use Let\
translations.code.dim.ssl.fixHSTS: Add Strict-Transport-Security header. Submit to hstspreload.org after testing.
translations.code.dim.ssl.fixSelfSigned: Replace self-signed certificates with a trusted CA (Let\
translations.code.dim.ssl.fixTLS: Disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1 in your server config. Only allow TLS 1.2 and 1.3.
translations.code.dim.ssl.sub: Certificate validity, protocol versions, and cipher strength across all domains
translations.code.dim.ssl.title: SSL / TLS Health
translations.code.dim.threat.emptyDesc: Run a scan to check domains against threat intelligence feeds.
translations.code.dim.threat.fixC2: C2 indicators detected. Investigate immediately for compromised servers.
translations.code.dim.threat.fixReputation: Check if your IP is on blocklists (MXToolbox, AbuseIPDB).
translations.code.dim.threat.sub: C2 indicators, malware URLs, and IP reputation across domains
translations.code.dim.threat.title: Threat Intelligence
translations.code.dim.waf.emptyDesc: Run a scan to check for WAF presence on your domains.
translations.code.dim.waf.fixWAF: Deploy a WAF: Cloudflare (free), AWS WAF, or ModSecurity with OWASP CRS.
translations.code.dim.waf.sub: Web Application Firewall detection across all production domains
translations.code.dim.waf.title: WAF & Protection
translations.code.domains.importDiscovery: Discovery is running in the background for each new domain.
translations.code.domains.importHint: Paste domains (one per line) or upload a CSV file. Subdomains will be auto-grouped under their root domain.
translations.code.domains.scanAllAllBusy: All scans are already running or recently completed
translations.code.explore.footer: Flyto2 — Continuous external attack-surface monitoring. Data shown is sourced from public records and surface scans.
translations.code.explore.heroBody: Flyto2 continuously scans public-facing infrastructure across industries. Pick a sector or look up a domain to see the grade.
translations.code.explore.lockedExplanation: Severity, file paths, and remediation steps require sign-in.
translations.code.explore.notInKB: {domain} isn’t in our knowledge base yet
translations.code.explore.notInKBBody: Sign up to request an on-demand scan for any domain.
translations.code.explore.publicPreview: Public preview — numeric score and trend hidden
translations.code.explore.scoreCardError: Couldn’t load this company’s scorecard. Try again in a moment.
translations.code.exposure.activity.burstHint: possible scan campaign or coordinated attack. Inspect filtered category below.
translations.code.exposure.brand.letterPlaceholder: Letter will appear here once the template loads…
translations.code.exposure.brand.noThreatsDesc: No suspicious lookalike domains found for your brand
translations.code.exposure.brand.subtitle: Monitor for lookalike domains and brand abuse
translations.code.exposure.brand.title: Brand Protection
translations.code.exposure.threat.subtitle: Breach exposure, C2 indicators, and IP reputation across your domains
translations.code.exposure.threat.title: Threat Intelligence
translations.code.external.actionPlanSub: Prioritized remediation steps — what to fix first and how
translations.code.external.errorBudgetHint: SLA breach tolerance per severity per quarter — declare a policy under Settings to enable.
translations.code.external.forecastHint: 30-day projection from linear trend + 7-day seasonal. Bands widen with horizon; near-term is more reliable.
translations.code.external.intelSub: Findings, remediation guidance, and supply chain intelligence
translations.code.external.mttrTrendHint: P50 last 4 weeks vs prior 4 — negative = improving
translations.code.external.noActionsDesc: No open issues found. Your external security posture is clean.
translations.code.external.noDomainsDesc: Add domains via the Domains view to start external security monitoring.
translations.code.external.noIssues: No open issues — all domains are clean.
translations.code.external.noReportDesc: Run at least one domain scan to generate the executive report.
translations.code.external.noSLAIssuesDesc: All domains are clean. No SLA tracking needed.
translations.code.external.noTrendsDesc: Score trends require at least two scans. Enable daily monitoring to populate the trend chart.
translations.code.external.noVendorsDesc: Run a domain scan to detect third-party vendors (CDN, analytics, hosting, WAF, etc.).
translations.code.external.peerBenchmarkHint: Sector benchmark from public corpus. Updated daily.
translations.code.external.postureSub: External security posture across all monitored domains
translations.code.external.preset_board_hint: High-level posture + trends only. No raw findings list, no SLA detail.
translations.code.external.preset_compliance_hint: Findings + SLA + controls — the audit trail an external assessor needs.
translations.code.external.preset_external_hint: Summary view + redacted hostnames for sharing with vendors / partners / press.
translations.code.external.preset_soc_hint: Everything, no redaction — internal operations briefing.
translations.code.external.slaBreaches: SLA breaches — issues exceeding remediation window
translations.code.external.slaSub: Remediation window compliance per severity level
translations.code.external.supplyAdviceCritical: You have critical-risk vendors. Audit their security practices, ensure SRI for external scripts, and consider alternatives for the highest-risk dependencies.
translations.code.external.supplyAdviceOk: No critical-risk vendors detected. Continue monitoring — vendor risk can change when they have incidents or update their infrastructure.
translations.code.external.supplyChainSub: Third-party vendor risk across all monitored domains
translations.code.external.trendsSub: Historical security posture and SLA compliance
translations.code.fixPlan.emptySub: Generate a week-bucketed remediation roadmap from the current findings.
translations.code.fixPlan.emptySubAuto: Auto-generated after each scan. Trigger a fresh scan to produce a new plan.
translations.code.fixPlan.title: Fix Plan
translations.code.gitlabCallback.exchangeFailed: Failed to exchange the authorization code for a token.
translations.code.gitlabCallback.invalidState: Invalid OAuth state. Please try connecting again.
translations.code.gitlabCallback.missingVerifier: PKCE verifier missing. Please restart the connection.
translations.code.issues.autofixHint: This finding can be automatically patched. Go to the Fix tab to see available patches or run AutoFix.
translations.code.issues.name: Name
translations.code.issues.noAutoPR: No auto-PR yet — run AutoFix on this repo to generate a patch.
translations.code.issues.noContext: No cross-dimensional signals for this finding yet.
translations.code.issues.noContextHint: Run more scans (pentest, taint analysis) to enrich this finding with reachability and risk context.
translations.code.issues.noFixAvailable: No version fix available for this finding.
translations.code.issues.noVerifications: No verification runs yet. Click Verify to start.
translations.code.issues.skip_reason_manifest_not_fou: Package not found in any manifest
translations.code.issues.skip_reason_no_fix_version: No fix version is available yet
translations.code.issues.taintHint: User-controlled data reaches this code path without sanitization.
translations.code.lens.noData: No lens data available. Connect repos and run scans with flyto-indexer v2.12+ to see cross-signal hotspots.
translations.code.lens.title: Lens
translations.code.login.cantCreateAccount: Unable to create account. Please try signing in instead.
translations.code.login.resetSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link
translations.code.login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later
translations.code.login.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
translations.code.login.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
translations.code.mit.evidenceEmpty: No automated checks recorded yet. The hourly evidence worker probes verification_evidence URLs — add a probe-able URL on this control to start the ledger.
translations.code.monitoring.emptyDesc: Monitoring events will appear here when changes are detected across your domains.
translations.code.monitoring.subtitle: Real-time monitoring events across your domains
translations.code.monitoring.title: Alert Center
translations.code.news.title: Security News
translations.code.onboarding.bitbucketDesc: Connect your Bitbucket workspace to import repos.
translations.code.onboarding.connectGithubDesc: Connect your GitHub account to get started
translations.code.onboarding.githubDesc: Connect your GitHub account to import repositories.
translations.code.onboarding.gitlabDesc: Connect your GitLab instance to import projects.
translations.code.onboarding.noReposHint: No repos selected — pick at least one.
translations.code.onboarding.scanDoneDesc: Results will appear on the dashboard shortly.
translations.code.onboarding.uploadDesc: Already scanned with flyto-indexer? Upload results without connecting GitHub.
translations.code.paths.methodGraph: Bounded BFS over the asset+finding graph. Probability is the product of per-edge weights.
translations.code.paths.methodHeuristic: Pattern-matched against handcrafted chain shapes (v1). The priority number is a loudness score, not a probability.
translations.code.pentest.addDomainFirst: Add a domain in 'Domains & API' first, then run penetration tests against it here.
translations.code.pentest.alreadyRunning: A scan is already in flight
translations.code.pentest.attackSurfaceDesc: Discover subdomains, DNS, exposed credentials, misconfigurations
translations.code.pentest.check.accessControlDesc: Identify unauthorized data access. Check cross-tenant data leakage, authorization bypass, IDOR (data exposure risk), and improper access control.
translations.code.pentest.check.authSessionDesc: Verify login security. Check for brute force vulnerabilities, missing/improper authentication, and cookie integrity issues.
translations.code.pentest.check.businessLogicDesc: AI-driven logic testing. Detect complex input validation errors and general logic flaws that static scanners cannot identify.
translations.code.pentest.check.clientSideDesc: Protect browser security. Scan for XSS, CSRF, open redirects, and web cache poisoning attacks.
translations.code.pentest.check.codeInjectionDesc: Detect if untrusted data executes system commands. Focus on Remote Code Execution (RCE) and OS command injection.
translations.code.pentest.check.deserializationDesc: Probe unsafe object handling. Target insecure deserialization and server-side template injection.
translations.code.pentest.check.fileMisconfigDesc: Scan filesystem risks including Local File Inclusion (LFI), unrestricted file upload, directory listing, path control, and error leakage.
translations.code.pentest.check.hardeningDesc: Identify missing or misconfigured defense controls including GraphQL hardening, CORS misconfiguration, TLS issues, and incorrect HTTP security headers.
translations.code.pentest.check.llmInjectionDesc: Ensure AI integrations are tamper-proof. Detect prompt injection, jailbreak, and system context leakage attempts.
translations.code.pentest.check.secretsCryptoDesc: Discover hardcoded credentials/passwords, weak encryption, JWT validation bypass, and sensitive data exposure.
translations.code.pentest.check.sqlInjectionDesc: Identify injection vulnerabilities in database queries. Covers SQL injection, NoSQL injection, XPath injection, and LDAP injection.
translations.code.pentest.check.ssrfDesc: Test if your server can be tricked into making requests to internal infrastructure or external systems.
translations.code.pentest.frontendDesc: Test CSP, cookies, exposed files, JWT, and other vulnerabilities
translations.code.pentest.graphqlDesc: Test GraphQL API against misconfigurations and attacks
translations.code.pentest.noFindingsDesc: The scan completed with no security findings. Your application passed all checks.
translations.code.pentest.restApiDesc: Test against SQLi, SSRF, BOLA and other attacks
translations.code.pentest.runHint: Run a DAST pentest against this target
translations.code.pentest.scanResultsSub: DAST findings from the latest penetration test
translations.code.pentest.selectTarget: Select a target to run tests
translations.code.pentest.stagingWarn: Only use on staging environments. Do not run against production.
translations.code.pentest.subtitle: OWASP-based security checks and DAST scanning across your targets
translations.code.pentest.title: Penetration Testing
translations.code.prDialog.empty: No open PR data -- the cache may not have this repo yet.
translations.code.prDialog.title: Open PR(s) touching this finding
translations.code.projects.createHint: A project represents one org / company. Connected repos and scan results are scoped to the project you create here.
translations.code.projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project? All repositories, scan data, security findings, and settings will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
translations.code.projects.deleteConfirmLabel: Type the project name to confirm
translations.code.projects.empty: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
translations.code.projects.emptyDesc: Projects group your repositories into separate war rooms — each with its own scans, health scores, and security insights.
translations.code.projects.name: Project Name
translations.code.projects.subtitle: Select a project to open the war room
translations.code.projects.title: Projects
translations.code.projects.type.attackSurfaceDesc: Discover domains, subdomains, exposed services, and SSL issues.
translations.code.projects.type.blackboxDesc: Test a live website or API without source code access.
translations.code.projects.type.codeAuditDesc: Connect repos, scan for vulnerabilities, dead code, and dependencies.
translations.code.pulse.empty: No findings to act on in this window. Either you are clean (good!) or no scan has populated alerts yet.
translations.code.pulse.emptyDesc: No priority findings right now. Run a scan to start populating results across all dimensions.
translations.code.pulse.hint: Findings ranked by composite blast radius — severity + open PR overlap + taint adjacency + AutoFix readiness + pentest verdict. The list answers "what to act on right now", not "what is most severe".
translations.code.pulse.loadError: Failed to load pulse — engine endpoint may be unreachable
translations.code.pulse.subtitle: Priority findings ranked by blast radius across all dimensions
translations.code.pulse.title: Pulse — what to act on right now
translations.code.pyramid.footerNote: Each pyramid weighs the same signals differently based on perspective.
translations.code.pyramid.noData: No pyramid data available. Run a scan with flyto-indexer v2.12+ to populate.
translations.code.pyramid.note: Scores aggregate bottom-up: raw signals → normalized → weighted → composite. Weights redistribute when signals are unavailable.
translations.code.pyramid.subtitle: Multi-perspective signal aggregation
translations.code.pyramid.title: Composite Pyramids
translations.code.repo.localHint: Run flyto-index scan . && flyto-index export . > scan.json, then upload the file.
translations.code.repo.promptMissing: Cannot generate AI prompt — scan data incomplete
translations.code.repoDetail.actionComplexity: {n} complex functions — consider refactoring to reduce risk.
translations.code.repoDetail.actionCriticalCve: Fix {n} critical CVEs immediately — they are actively exploitable.
translations.code.repoDetail.actionDeadCode: Remove dead code to reduce attack surface and maintenance burden.
translations.code.repoDetail.actionGoodShape: This repository is in good shape. Keep scanning regularly.
translations.code.repoDetail.actionHighCve: Address {n} high-severity vulnerabilities before they escalate.
translations.code.repoDetail.actionSecrets: {n} secrets detected — rotate and remove them from code.
translations.code.repoDetail.noIntelligence: No engineering intelligence data available. Run a scan to generate insights.
translations.code.repoDetail.scanningDesc: Cloning, indexing, and analyzing. This may take a few minutes for large repos.
translations.code.repoDetail.verifyTargetsHint: One URL per line. Dynamic verify probes are restricted to URLs on this list. Leave empty for no restriction (per-call consent still required in SaaS).
translations.code.repoList.emptyDesc: Connect your GitHub or GitLab repositories to start scanning for security issues, architecture insights, and more.
translations.code.repoList.name: Repository
translations.code.repoList.searchPlaceholder: Search repositories by name, owner, or language...
translations.code.repoList.subtitle: Manage and scan your connected repositories
translations.code.repoPicker.title: Select Account
translations.code.reports.clickToAdd: Click a widget to add it to your report
translations.code.reports.col.name: Name
translations.code.reports.col.title: Title
translations.code.reports.confirmDelete: Delete this report? This cannot be undone.
translations.code.reports.dragToJoin: Drag from port to port to create JOINs
translations.code.reports.emptyReportError: Add at least one widget before saving
translations.code.reports.emptySection: Click a widget on the right to add it here
translations.code.reports.noComponents: Design a widget above and save it here
translations.code.reports.previewTimeout: Report took too long to load. Try again.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.archOverviewDesc: Cross-repo architecture map with API routes, dependencies, dead code, and taint flow analysis.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.autofixReportDesc: Automated remediation coverage, patch success rate, and PR creation history.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.ciHistoryDesc: Overview of all failed and passed PR scans.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.codeQualityDesc: Dead code analysis, code complexity, taint flow paths, and remediation candidates.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.containerSecurityDesc: Container image vulnerability analysis with Trivy scan results and fix availability.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.cspmDesc: CSPM findings across AWS, GCP, and Azure with CIS benchmark status.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.ctemPostureDesc: External attack surface assessment with domain-level scoring, threat intelligence, and exposure trends.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.cveDatabaseDesc: Search all monitored CVEs with affected repos and timelines.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.externalPostureDesc: External attack surface, pentest projects, domain monitoring events, and score trends.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.iacSecurityDesc: IaC misconfigurations across Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, and Dockerfile.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.licenseSbomDesc: Open-source license risk analysis and software bill of materials.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.malwareReportDesc: Malware scan results from dependency analysis.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.monitoringReportDesc: Domain monitoring events: certificate changes, DNS changes, score regressions, new subdomains.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.multiComplianceDesc: Cross-framework compliance matrix: SOC2, ISO27001, PCI-DSS, OWASP mapped to findings.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.owaspDesc: Map your findings to OWASP Top 10 categories.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.pentestReportDesc: Red team campaign results with DAST findings, discovery timeline, and attack path analysis.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.riskMatrixDesc: Two-dimensional risk assessment: likelihood vs impact across all finding categories.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.runtimeSecurityDesc: Runtime telemetry events: threat detection, path traversal, IP-based attacks.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.scanActivityDesc: Scan execution history with status distribution, trigger types, and timing analysis.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.scoreTrendsDesc: Unified score history with grade changes, category breakdown, and scan delta analysis.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.securityAuditDesc: Comprehensive security posture overview with findings, severity distribution, and remediation roadmap.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.trendDesc: View the evolution of open issues over time.
translations.code.reports.tmpl.vaReportDesc: Detailed vulnerability inventory with fix availability, SLA compliance, and evidence chain.
translations.code.scoring.autoTriageDesc: Dedup, merge, and score noise reduction automatically
translations.code.scoring.benchmarkNoSector: Set your industry sector in Settings to enable peer benchmarking.
translations.code.scoring.capabilitiesDesc: Built-in security tools that run on every scan:
translations.code.scoring.ciGateDesc: Block PRs with critical vulnerabilities before merge
translations.code.scoring.confidence.l0: L0 — inferred from a single static signal; not yet verified.
translations.code.scoring.confidence.l1: L1 — corroborated by one independent source.
translations.code.scoring.confidence.l2: L2 — multi-source or live-DAST verified — penalty applies at full weight.
translations.code.scoring.containerScanDesc: Detect OS-level CVEs in Docker images via Trivy
translations.code.scoring.contextDisclaimer: Observing / context vectors are tracked but do not affect the rating yet.
translations.code.scoring.crossDim.autofixCoverageTip: Click to view AutoFix-eligible findings — patches already ready.
translations.code.scoring.crossDim.blastRadiusTip: Click to open Pulse — top findings ranked by blast radius.
translations.code.scoring.crossDim.pentestVerdictTip: Click to view pentest-confirmed findings in the Fix Queue.
translations.code.scoring.crossDim.prAdjacencyTip: Click to open the Fix Queue filtered to findings touched by an open PR.
translations.code.scoring.crossDim.taintAdjacencyTip: Click to walk through findings reachable from a taint source.
translations.code.scoring.cvePenaltyNote: Known vulnerabilities (CVEs) apply a diminishing penalty to the health score. The formula caps the maximum penalty at 25 points to prevent a single severe CVE from zeroing the score.
translations.code.scoring.dimComplexity: Cyclomatic complexity of functions. High complexity = harder to maintain and more bug-prone.
translations.code.scoring.dimCoverage: Documentation score, README quality, API doc coverage.
translations.code.scoring.dimDeadCode: Unused exports, unreachable code, orphan files. Increases attack surface.
translations.code.scoring.dimSecurity: Secrets leaked, SAST findings, taint flows, known CVEs.
translations.code.scoring.dimensionsDesc: The raw health score is a weighted composite of four dimensions, each scored independently:
translations.code.scoring.empty.noDomainData: No domain data available. Run discovery on your domains to populate this view.
translations.code.scoring.empty.noRepoData: No per-repo data available for this vector.
translations.code.scoring.evidenceClickHint: Click a row to open Fix Queue
translations.code.scoring.formulaNote: Raw engine score (0–100) mapped to display range (250–900), floored to nearest 10 — eliminates false precision.
translations.code.scoring.gradeA: Minimal risk. Strong security posture, clean code, good documentation.
translations.code.scoring.gradeB: Low risk. Minor issues present, generally well-maintained.
translations.code.scoring.gradeC: Moderate risk. Notable security or quality gaps requiring attention.
translations.code.scoring.gradeD: High risk. Significant vulnerabilities or technical debt.
translations.code.scoring.iacScanDesc: Security checks for Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker configs
translations.code.scoring.licenseScanDesc: Flag GPL, AGPL, SSPL and other copyleft/risky licenses
translations.code.scoring.methodDesc: The overall score is a weighted average across active dimensions. Dimensions without scan data are automatically excluded — their weight is redistributed to the remaining dimensions. This ensures organizations aren’t penalized for dimensions they haven’t measured yet.
translations.code.scoring.mode.observing: Observing — data collected, not yet scored
translations.code.scoring.mode.observingLabel: Observing — data collected, not yet scored
translations.code.scoring.observationOnly: observation only — does not affect rating
translations.code.scoring.reachabilityDesc: Filter out CVEs in code paths that are never called
translations.code.scoring.scoreExplanation: Your security rating is calculated from {active} active risk vectors across {categories} categories. Vectors without data are excluded and weights redistributed.
translations.code.scoring.standardsDesc: Code scanning follows industry-standard vulnerability taxonomies:
translations.code.scoring.subVectorSub: Component drill-down — observations, weight, and contribution to the overall score.
translations.code.scoring.subtitle: How Flyto2 Code calculates health scores and security grades
translations.code.scoring.title: Scoring Breakdown
translations.code.scoring.whyFloorDesc: Micro-changes in score (e.g. 735 → 736) are not statistically significant. Flooring ensures every visible score change maps to at least one real risk vector change — making score movements explainable and actionable.
translations.code.settings.apiKeysDesc: API keys authenticate CLI scan uploads. Use them with flyto-index to scan locally without giving the server access to your source code.
translations.code.settings.copyKeyWarning: Copy this key now -- it won\
translations.code.settings.dataRetentionDesc: How long to keep scan results
translations.code.settings.localUploadDesc: Upload flyto-indexer results for a new or existing repository -- no GitHub token needed.
translations.code.settings.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to start scanning locally.
translations.code.settings.scanFreqDesc: How often to run automated scans
translations.code.settings.scanScheduleDesc: How often to run scheduled scans
translations.code.settings.subtitle: Subtitle
translations.code.settings.title: Settings
translations.code.settings.verifyAllowlistHint: Configure the list of URLs dynamic probes may target on each repository's detail page (Verification allowlist section).
translations.code.settings.verifyDynamicDesc: Advanced mode that sends synthetic attack payloads to a target URL. Requires explicit consent on each use in the SaaS deployment. Enabled automatically on the enterprise offline deployment, where the runner lives inside your network.
translations.code.settings.verifyStaticDesc: Used when a user clicks Verify. Checks whether the vulnerable package is imported by the repo. Sends no HTTP traffic — always safe in multi-tenant SaaS.
translations.code.ssl.subject: Subject
translations.code.studio.noFixPlan: No fix plan available — run a scan first
translations.code.upload.dropHint: Drag & drop scan.json here, or click to select
translations.code.waf.title: WAF Detection
translations.code.warroom.apiSelectRepo: Select a repo to view routes
translations.code.warroom.archComplexityDetailHint: Per-function detail not yet exposed by indexer profile — flyto-indexer audit can list specific functions on demand.
translations.code.warroom.archComplexityHint: Functions with cyclomatic complexity ≥ 5. High complexity = harder to test + more bug-prone. Targets: largest repos first, then those with the highest single-function max.
translations.code.warroom.archDeadHint: Each row is a specific symbol the indexer could not find a reference to. The action column tells you how to verify before deleting — false positives are possible for dynamic imports, reflection, framework hooks, and tests.
translations.code.warroom.archImportsHint: The packages each repo leans on most. Concentrated usage = supply-chain risk if any single dep ships a bad version. Click a repo to see the full top-30.
translations.code.warroom.archMoreFiles: more files — click "Copy paths" for the full list
translations.code.warroom.archReposNone: No repository architecture data — run a scan first.
translations.code.warroom.budgetFormHint: Tokens are summed across every red-team campaign in this org. A breach pauses dispatch and opens an incident.
translations.code.warroom.budgetPoliciesEmpty: No caps yet — add one to start tracking spend.
translations.code.warroom.cicdConnectHint: Connect your CI/CD pipeline in Settings > Integrations to view build and deploy status.
translations.code.warroom.cicdConnectTitle: Connect GitHub to view CI/CD data
translations.code.warroom.cicdNone: No GitHub Actions runs found across your connected repos.
translations.code.warroom.clickToSeeCode: Click a repository to see findings
translations.code.warroom.comingSoonDesc: This feature is under development and will be available soon.
translations.code.warroom.confidenceTooltip: How sure the engine is about this verdict. Low = pattern match only — read the verification method below.
translations.code.warroom.containerEmptyDesc: Container scanning detects vulnerabilities in Docker images and base layers. Connect repos with Dockerfiles and run a scan to see results here.
translations.code.warroom.cspmEmpty: Cloud posture findings come from a cloud-config snapshot. Upload a snapshot via the API or wait for SDK-based live scanning (planned). Connecting a code repo alone will not populate this view.
translations.code.warroom.cspmSub: Cloud misconfiguration findings from snapshot uploads
translations.code.warroom.deadCodeNone: No dead code detected — clean codebase.
translations.code.warroom.depsConcentrationWarn: One repo accounts for the majority of uses — single-point-of-failure risk if that repo is deprecated.
translations.code.warroom.depsNone: No dependencies detected — scan some repos first.
translations.code.warroom.depsSub: Shared packages, concentration risk & supply-chain exposure
translations.code.warroom.docsApiHint: API documentation can be found in Architecture > API List.
translations.code.warroom.docsChangelogHint: Changelog generation is planned for a future release.
translations.code.warroom.docsDetailHint: Documentation coverage details are available in each repository's detail page.
translations.code.warroom.docsReadmeHint: README quality scores are available in each repository's detail page.
translations.code.warroom.docsWhitepaperHint: Whitepaper generation will be available in Studio > AI Outputs.
translations.code.warroom.dupActionHint: Extract this block into a shared function or module. If the copies have diverged slightly, unify them first, then extract.
translations.code.warroom.dupErrorHint: Check your network connection and try refreshing the page.
translations.code.warroom.dupHint: Each row is a code block that appears in two or more locations. Extract shared logic into a function, module, or utility to reduce maintenance burden and divergence risk.
translations.code.warroom.dupNone: No duplicate code detected — clean codebase.
translations.code.warroom.dupNoneDesc: Your codebase has no detected code duplication. This is a sign of good engineering practices.
translations.code.warroom.duplicatesSub: Repeated code blocks across all repos
translations.code.warroom.dynamicVerificationMethod: Dynamic probe against target_url using a GENERIC input-validation payload (SQLi-style fuzz string). A pattern-match verdict, not CVE-specific exploitation — the result shows whether the server has basic input filtering, not whether this particular CVE is reachable. Treat "SUSPECTED EXPLOITABLE" as a prompt to investigate manually.
translations.code.warroom.findingNoMatch: No symbols match the current filter.
translations.code.warroom.findingShowingFirst: Showing first 200 — narrow the filter or click Copy visible to dump the full set.
translations.code.warroom.fwDriftWarn: Same framework at different versions — coordinate upgrades or hold back the laggard.
translations.code.warroom.fwNone: No frameworks detected — scan some repos first.
translations.code.warroom.hintAnalytics: View health trends in the Dashboard.
translations.code.warroom.hintApps: View your app structure in Architecture > Overview.
translations.code.warroom.hintCicd: View PR activity in the Dashboard.
translations.code.warroom.hintCloud: Connect your cloud account in Settings > Integrations.
translations.code.warroom.hintResources: Infrastructure data will be available when cloud integration is configured.
translations.code.warroom.hintTesting: View code quality metrics in Architecture > Code Quality.
translations.code.warroom.iacEmptyDesc: Infrastructure as Code scanning checks Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes manifests, and other IaC files. Run a scan on a repo with IaC files to populate this view.
translations.code.warroom.importsNone: No import data — run a scan first.
translations.code.warroom.licenseNoRepos: License scanning starts automatically once you connect a GitHub or GitLab repo. Connect a repository to begin.
translations.code.warroom.licenseNotScannedYet: No license issues recorded yet. Either the latest scan is still running, the connected repos declare only safe licenses, or the metadata could not be extracted. Check the Repos view for scan status.
translations.code.warroom.malwareEmptyDesc: Malware scanning checks your dependencies against known malicious package databases. Run a scan on your repositories to populate this view.
translations.code.warroom.malwareSub: Known malicious packages in your dependency tree
translations.code.warroom.noApiData: No API data. Run a scan to discover endpoints.
translations.code.warroom.noAuditData: No audit data. Run a scan first.
translations.code.warroom.noData: No data available. Connect and scan your repos first.
translations.code.warroom.noDepsData: No dependency data. Run a scan first.
translations.code.warroom.noModuleData: No module data. Run a scan first.
translations.code.warroom.noRepos: No repositories connected. Connect a repo to view data.
translations.code.warroom.pipelineDescBaseline: Read-only recon. Detects tech stack, endpoints, WAF.
translations.code.warroom.pipelineDescProbe: Ranks suspected vulnerabilities from the surface.
translations.code.warroom.pipelineDescRecheck: Re-fires confirmed findings with payload + session variance to filter false positives.
translations.code.warroom.pipelineDescReport: Compresses proven findings into an exec-ready report.
translations.code.warroom.pipelineDescVerify: Targeted payloads to confirm or reject each suspect.
translations.code.warroom.pipelineIdleHint: Click START to launch a 5-phase campaign — Baseline → Probe → Verify → Recheck → Report.
translations.code.warroom.pipelineOpenReportTip: Open print-ready HTML report — Cmd/Ctrl+P to save as PDF
translations.code.warroom.pipelineRetestTip: Re-run only the proven findings to verify fixes
translations.code.warroom.pipelineTokensTip: LLM tokens consumed across all phases
translations.code.warroom.prNone: No pull requests yet across your connected repos.
translations.code.warroom.reachEmpty: No taint analysis data — run a scan with taint enabled in flyto-indexer to populate this view.
translations.code.warroom.reachEmptyDesc: Run a scan with taint analysis enabled to populate this view.
translations.code.warroom.reachFlowsEmpty: No per-flow data — repos scanned before this feature was added show counts only. Re-scan to populate.
translations.code.warroom.reachHow: Taint analysis traces user-controlled values (sources like request.args, env vars, file reads) through your code to dangerous functions (sinks like os.system, eval, raw SQL). When a value reaches a sink without going through a sanitizer, it's an "unsanitized flow" — the most likely class of security bug. Click any flow below to see the source / sink expressions and call path.
translations.code.warroom.redTeamAIIdle: AI is standing by. Pick a target and it will analyse the attack surface.
translations.code.warroom.redTeamFleetEmpty: no discovery scans yet — campaign runs independently
translations.code.warroom.redTeamFleetIdle: attack fleet — pick a target to launch
translations.code.warroom.redTeamIdleMeta: pick a domain to launch a campaign
translations.code.warroom.redTeamNoDomains: No domains yet — add one on the Domains & API page first.
translations.code.warroom.redTeamPreviewEmpty: No runnable playbooks for this target
translations.code.warroom.redTeamPreviewTip: Dry-run — no traffic, just the plan
translations.code.warroom.riskFormula: Risk = secrets x 3 + critical CVEs x 5 + high CVEs x 3 + findings
translations.code.warroom.runtimeEmpty: Runtime events come from an SDK installed in your running app. Create an org API key in Settings and install the SDK to start streaming events here.
translations.code.warroom.runtimeSub: Live attack detection from production SDKs
translations.code.warroom.secActionAllClear: All clear — no open security actions.
translations.code.warroom.secActionEmpty: No open security findings across this org. Run a scan to populate this list.
translations.code.warroom.secActionHint: Open items across every connected repo, ranked by severity. Click a row to jump to the affected repo. Use the filters to narrow by type, severity, or repo.
translations.code.warroom.secActionRollupTip: Indexer reports a count without per-finding detail. Open the repo to investigate.
translations.code.warroom.testGuidance: Detailed unit test, E2E, and checklist views are available in Architecture > Code Quality.
translations.code.warroom.verifyAckLabel: I am authorised to send security test payloads to this URL.
translations.code.warroom.verifyDynamicHint: Send synthetic attack requests to the target URL and compare responses. Only run against infrastructure you own and are authorised to test.
translations.code.warroom.verifyDynamicWarnBody: Dynamic probes transmit SQLi-style fuzz strings to target_url. Target WAFs and SIEMs will see them — only run against staging environments or infrastructure you have explicit authorisation to test.
translations.code.warroom.verifyInvalidUrl: Must be a valid http:// or https:// URL
translations.code.warroom.verifyLibraryNotice: This repo is a library / SDK — there is no deployed URL to probe. Dynamic verification is disabled because HTTP probes against an unrelated domain cannot prove whether a library CVE is exploitable here. Static reachability via the import graph is the meaningful answer for library dependencies.
translations.code.warroom.verifyStaticHint: Check if the vulnerable package is imported. No HTTP traffic. Always safe.
translations.code.warroom.vulnsRedirect: View and manage all security vulnerabilities in the Issues feed.
translations.code.whois.title: WHOIS / RDAP
